newsignuppage-desc: Adds new features to the [[Special:CreateAccount|signup form]]
newsignuppage-loginform-birthdate: Birth date (format: YYYY-MM-DD or MM/DD/YYYY; you must be at least $1 years old)
newsignuppage-loginform-age-honesty: I confirm that I have been honest about my age
newsignuppage-loginform-tos: I am over $3 years of age and I have read, understood and agree to be bound by the [$1 Terms of Service] and [$2 Privacy Policy]
newsignuppage-must-accept-tos: You must accept the site's Terms of Service in order to be able to create an account!
newsignuppage-must-confirm-age: You must confirm that you have been honest about your age in order to be able to create an account!
newsignuppage-invalid-birthdate: Please enter a valid birth date.
action-bypasstoscheck: create new accounts without explicitly accepting the site's Terms of Service
right-bypasstoscheck: Create new accounts without explicitly accepting the site's Terms of Service
